# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.

Load secrets from environment variables or a secret manager rather than embedding them in code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

// File: app/Services/TwilioService.php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use Twilio\Rest\Client;

class TwilioService
{
    private $accountSid;
    private $authToken;
    private $twilioClient;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = Config::get('services.twilio.account_sid');
        $this->authToken = Config::get('services.twilio.auth_token');

        $this->twilioClient = new Client($this->accountSid, $this->authToken);
    }

    public function sendSms(string $to, string $message)
    {
        try {
            $this->twilioClient->messages
                ->create($to, [
                    'from' => Config::get('services.twilio.from_number'),
                    'body' => $message,
                ]);

            return true;
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            // Handle Twilio API errors here
            return false;
        }
    }
}
